subject: heavily armored figure in dark spiked plate armor wielding a large greataxe, FFXIV Warrior job class
description: A powerfully built humanoid figure in dark, spike-trimmed plate armor stands in a low, wide-legged stance holding a large greataxe in both hands. The armor features prominent pauldrons with angular protrusions and crimson wrapping on the arms. The blade of the greataxe is broad and crescent-shaped, held low and forward. The background is a warm cream parchment. The rendering style is consistent with FFXIV's 3D character aesthetic.
foreground: armored figure in dark spiked plate, wide stance, holding greataxe with both hands
emotion: aggressive ready stance, head lowered, imposing
